title: Converting JSON Schema to TypeScript Definitions
scenario: Translate JSON schema to equivalent TypeScript definitions for data validation and serialization. The input may include nested objects and arrays, and the output should demonstrate an understanding of TypeScript's type system and JSON schema syntax.
constraints: Must correctly handle nested objects and arrays

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output correctly maps JSON schema to TypeScript definitions.
Check if the output uses TypeScript type annotations.
Check if the output correctly handles nested objects and arrays.
